de.englishNote: German universities commonly ask for IELTS 6.5+ (or TOEFL/PTE equivalents) for English-taught Master's; German-taught programs require TestDaF/DSH.

source.name: DAAD — Study in Germany: Admission requirements

gb.englishNote: UK universities typically require IELTS 6.0–6.5 (undergraduate) or 6.5–7.0 (postgraduate) for a CAS; check each course page.

extraSources.name: British Council — Study in the UK

ca.englishNote: Canadian universities usually require IELTS 6.5 (PG) or 6.0–6.5 (UG), or equivalent TOEFL/PTE.

au.englishNote: Australian universities commonly require IELTS 6.5 with no band below 6.0 for many programs.

nl.englishNote: Dutch English-taught programs typically require IELTS 6.0–6.5 (Bachelor's) or 6.5 (Master's).

ie.englishNote: Irish universities typically require IELTS 6.5 for most degree programs.

source.name: Education in Ireland — How to apply

us.englishNote: U.S. universities commonly require TOEFL iBT 80–100 or IELTS 6.5–7.0; many graduate programs also weigh GRE/GMAT.

source.name: EducationUSA (U.S. Dept of State) — Applying to U.S. universities

se.englishNote: Swedish English-taught programmes typically require IELTS 6.5 (with no band below 5.5) or equivalent TOEFL.

source.name: University Admissions in Sweden — Entry requirements

fr.englishNote: French English-taught programmes usually require IELTS 6.0–6.5; French-taught programmes require DELF/DALF/TCF.

nz.englishNote: New Zealand universities commonly require IELTS 6.0 (UG) or 6.5 (PG), or equivalent TOEFL/PTE.

source.name: Study with New Zealand — How to apply

it.englishNote: Italian English-taught programmes typically require IELTS 6.0–6.5; Italian-taught programmes require CILS/CELI.

es.englishNote: Spanish English-taught programmes usually require IELTS 6.0–6.5; Spanish-taught programmes require DELE/SIELE.

fi.englishNote: Finnish English-taught programmes typically require IELTS 6.0–6.5 or equivalent TOEFL.

no.englishNote: Norwegian English-taught programmes typically require IELTS 6.0–6.5 or equivalent.

source.name: Study in Norway — Cost and requirements

ch.englishNote: Swiss English-taught Master's typically require IELTS 6.5–7.0; bachelor programmes are often in the local language.

dk.englishNote: Danish English-taught programmes typically require IELTS 6.5 (with no band below 5.5).

at.englishNote: Austrian English-taught programmes typically require IELTS 6.0–6.5; German-taught require a German certificate.

jp.englishNote: Japanese English-taught programmes typically require TOEFL iBT 80+ or IELTS 6.0–6.5; Japanese-taught require JLPT N2/N1.

source.name: Study in Japan (MEXT) — How to apply

kr.englishNote: Korean English-taught programmes typically require TOEFL iBT 80+ or IELTS 5.5–6.5; Korean-taught require TOPIK level 3–4.

be.englishNote: Belgian English-taught Master's typically require IELTS 6.5; bachelor programmes are often in Dutch or French.

pl.englishNote: Polish English-taught programmes typically require IELTS 6.0–6.5 or equivalent.

cz.englishNote: Czech English-taught programmes typically require IELTS 6.0–6.5 or equivalent.

pt.englishNote: Portuguese English-taught programmes typically require IELTS 6.0–6.5; Portuguese-taught require a Portuguese certificate.

my.englishNote: Malaysian English-taught programmes typically require IELTS 5.5–6.5 depending on level.

ae.englishNote: UAE universities commonly require IELTS 5.5–6.5 (or equivalent TOEFL) depending on level.

source.name: The UAE Government Portal — Higher education
